title: Reverse Crafting
description: recycle your unwanted or worn-out tools, armor, slabs, stairs, and utility blocks back into their primary constituent materials
body:
![thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3b703333c33995b56b4966c2853d4ca21b74dc5.jpeg)

## ⚡ Recycle Your Gear. Reclaim Your Materials.
**Reverse Crafting** is a highly balanced, lightweight, and modern Minecraft datapack that lets you recycle your unwanted or worn-out tools, armor, slabs, stairs, and utility blocks back into their primary constituent materials—**completely exploit-free!** 

Designed specifically for Minecraft **26.1 (Datapack Format 101)**, this pack integrates seamlessly into survival mode using vanilla mechanics like smelting, blasting, stonecutting, and shapeless uncrafting.

## 🛠️ Key Features
*   🔥 **Metal Recycling (Smelting & Blasting):** Toss copper, iron, gold, netherite, and chainmail items into a furnace or blast furnace to recover exactly **1 base ingot** (or 1 iron block for anvils).
*   📦 **Stairs to Blocks (Stonecutter):** Slice any of the **40+ stair variants** in the stonecutter to convert them back into **1 full block**.
*   🧩 **Slabs to Blocks (Shapeless):** Put **2 matching slabs** in any crafting grid to get **1 full block** back.
*   💎 **Luxury & Utility Uncrafting:** Safely reclaim diamonds from jukeboxes/enchanting tables, or wood from chest/crafting tables.
*   🛡️ **100% Exploit-Free:** Carefully designed conversion ratios ensure players cannot duplicate resources or infinitely refresh tool durability. Highly recommended for multiplayer and survival servers!

---

## 📖 How It Works 

### 1. Smelting & Blasting

Recycle your metal weapons, armor, and utility items instantly. Blasting is twice as fast!

| Input | Process | Output |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Any Iron Equipment, Shears, Shield, Bucket, Compass, Cauldron, Minecart, Flint & Steel | Smelting / Blasting | 1x `Iron Ingot` |
| Any Gold Equipment, Clock | Smelting / Blasting | 1x `Gold Ingot` |
| Any Copper Equipment, Spyglass, Lightning Rod | Smelting / Blasting | 1x `Copper Ingot` |
| Any Netherite Equipment | Smelting / Blasting | 1x `Netherite Ingot` |
| Any Chainmail Armor piece | Smelting / Blasting | 1x `Iron Ingot` |

> 
> All smelting and blasting recipes have been set to **instant smelting/blasting (0 seconds)** for premium quality of life!

---

### 2. Shapeless Uncrafting 

Place these items in any standard crafting grid to extract their key ingredients:

*   **Diamond Gear:** 1x Diamond Tool/Armor ➡️ **1x Diamond**
*   **Leather Armor:** 1x Leather Armor piece ➡️ **1x Leather**
*   **Stone Tools:** 1x Stone Tool ➡️ **1x Cobblestone**
*   **Wooden Tools:** 1x Wood Tool ➡️ **1x Oak Planks**
*   **Luxury Utilities:**
    *   `Jukebox` ➡️ **1x Diamond**
    *   `Enchanting Table` ➡️ **1x Diamond**
    *   `Anvil` / `Chipped` / `Damaged` ➡️ **1x Iron Block**
    *   `Hopper` ➡️ **1x Chest**
    *   `Cauldron` / `Minecart` ➡️ **3x Iron Ingots**
    *   `Brewing Stand` ➡️ **1x Blaze Rod**
    *   `Chest` ➡️ **8x Oak Planks**
    *   `Crafting Table` ➡️ **4x Oak Planks**

---

### 3. Slabs & Block De-compression 

*   **Slab Merging:** Place **2 matching slabs** of any type (planks, stones, quartz, copper, etc.) into a crafting grid to get **1 full block**.
*   **Block De-compression:** Return compact blocks back into their raw components:
    *   `Amethyst Block` ➡️ **4x Amethyst Shard**
    *   `Quartz Block` ➡️ **4x Quartz**
    *   `Glowstone Block` ➡️ **4x Glowstone Dust**
    *   `Clay Block` ➡️ **4x Clay Ball**
    *   `Bricks` / `Nether Bricks` ➡️ **4x Brick / Nether Brick**
    *   `Honeycomb Block` ➡️ **4x Honeycomb**
    *   `Prismarine` ➡️ **4x Prismarine Shard**

---

### 4. Stair Recutter 

Put any stair block into a Stonecutter to safely slice it down into its base block form (1:1 conversion). Supported for **all 40+ vanilla wood and stone stairs**!

---

## 🔒 Anti-Exploit Design

> 
> **Why is this pack safe for survival servers?**
> Standard uncrafting packs usually return *all* materials used to craft an item. This introduces heavy duplication loops: players craft a pickaxe, use it until it has 1 durability left, and uncraft it to get all materials back, gaining infinite tools.
> **Reverse Crafting** avoids this by returning **exactly 1 constituent item** (the primary material) and discarding sticks/handles. Players are heavily penalized for uncrafting, making recycling useful only for unwanted loot or miscrafts, maintaining Minecraft's survival economy.

---

## 🚀 Installation Guide

1. Download the datapack folder/ZIP file.
2. In Minecraft, select your world, click **Edit**, and select **Open World Folder**.
3. Open the `datapacks` directory and drop the `mysterious-curie` folder (or ZIP) inside.
4. Open the world (or type `/reload` if you are already in the world) to load the recipes!
